Name: Australian Dollar (2024)
Description: Representive exchange rates as currency units per US Dollar and averaged over the year 2024 and with 3 significant digits from the International Monetary Fund. The currency names and codes are chosen according to ISO 4217. The reference currency in the database is set to Euro so that all conversion factors refer to 1 EUR, but the reference currency of the database can be changed at any time by clicking "Set as reference currency" and the conversion factors and exchange rates to the new reference currency will be updated automatically.

Name: Euro (2005)
Description: Total producer price changes in industry from the reference year 2005 until 2024 as the sum of annual percentage changes compared to the same period in previous years (starting from 2006 and including 2024) with 3 significant digits from Eurostat. The currency names and codes are chosen according to ISO 4217.
